result.summary: Vercel (zeit.co) exposes a REST API at https://api.vercel.com, a `vercel` CLI, and Vercel MCP; auth is via Vercel access tokens for the API, `vercel login` for the CLI, and MCP auth could not be determined.

vercel_access_token.label: Vercel Access Token
vercel_access_token.setup: Go to [Account Settings → Tokens](https://vercel.com/account/tokens) and create a new Access Token. Copy the token value once and store it securely. Use it as `Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>` for Vercel API requests.

vercel_oauth_app.label: Vercel OAuth client
vercel_oauth_app.setup: Register an OAuth client at [OAuth app registration](https://api.vercel.com/login/oauth/register). Use the authorization endpoint `https://vercel.com/oauth/authorize` and token endpoint `https://api.vercel.com/login/oauth/token`. Requested scopes observed: `openid`, `email`, `profile`.

vercel_cli_login.label: Vercel CLI session
vercel_cli_login.setup: Install the `vercel` CLI and run `vercel login` to authenticate. The CLI acquires your Vercel session for CLI-driven operations.
